formats.name: Standard
formats.metaNotes: Bo3 meta % from MTGGoldfish tournament data (2026-07-22); Standard Bo1 board ranked by real Arena ladder play (Untapped.gg) when available, else mirrors Bo3. Lists from MTGO when matched else Goldfish. Every card name verified via Scryfall.

formats.name: Pioneer
formats.metaNotes: Bo3 meta % from MTGGoldfish tournament data (2026-07-22); Standard Bo1 board ranked by real Arena ladder play (Untapped.gg) when available, else mirrors Bo3. Lists from MTGO when matched else Goldfish. Every card name verified via Scryfall.
